name: whois
title: Whois
description: Instantly perform WHOIS and RDAP lookups for domains and IP addresses. View registration dates, nameservers, and detailed registrant info.
author: zavbala

commands.name: whois
commands.title: Whois
commands.description: Lookup detailed WHOIS information for any domain or IP address directly from Raycast or your active browser tab.

preferences.name: registrarName
preferences.title: Preferred Registrar Name
preferences.description: The name of your preferred domain registrar. If provided along with the search URL, a 'Register' action will appear for available domains.

preferences.name: registrarUrl
preferences.title: Registrar Search URL
preferences.description: The search URL for your registrar. Use '{domain}' where the domain name should be injected.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
